### Cool Stuff & Try This
**[AI Gets Graded on App-Making Skills: MarkTechPost]**
Google released something called Android Bench, which is basically a report card and testing system to see how well large language models (LLMs – super-smart AIs trained on tons of text to chat, write, and even code) handle tasks for building Android apps, like those on your phone. It's cool because it pushes AI to get better at helping create games or social apps you love, making app development faster and more ac
sections.quick_bits:
### Quick Bits
**[AI Drama: Competition Keeps It Real]**
Another take on the Anthropic-Pentagon fallout shows how rival AI companies are pushing each other to be better and more ethical – OpenAI stepped in but faced uninstalls, proving users care about responsible AI. Huh, that's cool because it means your voice as a user can shape the future of tech!
Source: https://techcrunch.com/podcast/anthropic-vs-the-pentagon-the-saaspocalypse-and-why-competitions-is-good-actually/
